debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ D < @DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB''

  have h_ne : (B N hN).Nonempty := by

    have h_B'ne : B'.Nonempty := by
      by_contra h; have hN'bot : N' = ⊥ := by rw [hN'eq, Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h, sSup_empty]
      exact hB'' N hN (hN'bot ▸ hN')
    exact Set.eq_singleton_iff_nonempty_unique_mem.mpr ⟨h_B'ne, h_sub⟩
  rw [hN'eq, this, sSup_singleton]

  have h_nonempty : (B N hN).Nonempty := by

    have : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.1 h_none', sSup_empty]
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  exact h_nonempty.subset_singleton_iff.1 h_all

  apply hB_ne

    intro s hs
    rw [← h_eq]
    exact Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hN, hs⟩⟩
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · intro s hs
    have hs_le : s ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hs
    by_cases h_sne : s = N
    · exact h_sne ▸ Set.mem_singleton _
    · have : s ≤ N ⊓ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) :=
        le_inf hs_le (le_sSup (Set.mem_diff_of_mem (h_subset hs) h_sne))

  · intro s hs
    rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hs; subst hs
    have h_N_ne_bot : N ≠ ⊥ := fun h_eq => D.not_bot_mem (h_eq ▸ hN)
    have h_ne_bot : sSup (B N hN) ≠ ⊥ := hB N hN ▸ h_N_ne_bot
    have h_nonempty : (B N hN).Nonempty :=
      Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 (fun h_mt => h_ne_bot (h_mt.symm ▸ sSup_empty))

      have hs'_le : s' ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hs'
      by_cases h_s'ne : s' = N

      · have : s' ≤ N ⊓ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) :=
          le_inf hs'_le (le_sSup (Set.mem_diff_of_mem (h_subset hs') h_s'ne))
        rw [(D.sSupIndep N hN).eq_bot] at this
        exact (hB'' N hN (le_bot_iff.mp this ▸ hs')).elim
    rwa [this] at hs'

  · exact fun hx ↦ Set.mem_singleton_iff.2 (h_x_eq_N x hx)

    have : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
      by_contra h_empty
      have h_bot : N = ⊥ := (hB N hN).symm ▸ (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.1 h_empty).symm ▸ sSup_empty
      exact D.not_bot_mem (h_bot ▸ hN)
    rcases this with ⟨b, hb⟩
    rwa [h_x_eq_N b hb] at hb

    by_contra h_N
    have : N ≤ ⊥ := (D.sSupIndep N hN).eq_bot_of_le (hB N hN ▸ sSup_le_sSup (fun y hy ↦ ⟨h_sub hy, fun he ↦ h_N (he ▸ hy)⟩))

    intro x hx
    have h_in : x ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := by
      simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    rwa [← h] at h_in
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · intro x hx
    by_contra hxN
    have h1 : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx
    have h2 : x ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := le_sSup ⟨h_subset hx, hxN⟩
    have h3 : x ≤ N ⊓ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := le_inf h1 h2
    rw [(D.sSupIndep hN).eq_bot, le_bot_iff] at h3
    exact hB'' N hN (h3 ▸ hx)
  · intro x hx
    rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx; subst hx
    by_contra hN_not_mem
    have h1 : N ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      rw [hB N hN]
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      exact le_sSup ⟨h_subset hy, fun heq => hN_not_mem (heq ▸ hy)⟩
    have h2 : N ≤ N ⊓ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := le_inf le_rfl h1
    rw [(D.sSupIndep hN).eq_bot, le_bot_iff] at h2
    exact D.not_bot_mem (h2 ▸ hN)

    exact D.not_bot_mem (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_self this ▸ hN)

    intro x hx
    have hxD : x ∈ D := by
      rw [h_eq]

  have h_non : (B N hN).Nonempty := by

    rw [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at h_empty
    exact D.not_bot_mem (hB N hN ▸ h_empty ▸ sSup_empty ▸ hN)

simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop]; exists N, hN
      rcases h hXR with ⟨S, hS, hX_eq⟩
      have h_le_N : X ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hX
      have h_le : sSup S ≤ N := hX_eq ▸ h_le_N
      have hS_sub : S ⊆ {N} := by
        intro s hs
        by_contra hne
        have : s ≤ sSup ((D : Set _) \ {s}) :=
          le_trans (le_trans (le_sSup hs) h_le) (le_sSup (Set.mem_diff_of_mem hN hne.symm))
        exact D.not_bot_mem (hS ((D.sSupIndep s (hS hs)).eq_bot_of_le this) ▸ hs)
      rcases Set.subset_singleton_iff_eq_empty_or_singleton.mp hS_sub with hS_empty | hS_sing
      · subst hS_empty hX_eq
        simp at hX
        exact (hB'' N hN hX).elim
      · subst hS_sing hX_eq
        simp
    apply Set.Subset.antisymm h_sub
    intro X hX; simp at hX; subst hX
    by_contra h_empty
    have : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem.mpr h_empty, sSup_empty]
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)⟩

        (le_trans (hK_eq ▸ le_sSup hN') (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hK)) (le_sSup (Set.mem_diff_of_mem (hB' hN') h_diff))) ▸ hB' hN')
    rcases hB'ne with ⟨N', hN'⟩
    rwa [hK_eq, sSup_eq_single N' hN' (fun N'' hN'' ↦ by rw [h_all N'' hN'', h_all N' hN']), h_all N' hN']

    have hBne : (B N hN).Nonempty := by

      exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
    rcases hBne with ⟨K', hK'⟩
    rwa [h_sub_N K' hK'] at hK'
